_meta._capture_origin: Claude Code SessionStart hook contract from public docs; concrete session_id/cwd/transcript_path values aligned to the local transcript at ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-yuyu-liao-vicone-SecondSight/3756b281-8769-424f-bb1a-aa3fe1aeecc9.jsonl and permission mode from the same session (observed 2026-05-12). Startup source inferred from SessionStart:startup hook attachments in that transcript.
_meta._privacy_canary_field_rationale: Claude Code session hooks carry permission_mode, but SecondSight currently does not persist it into Event.data. The canary lives there so a future regression that copies raw permission state into data fails loudly while keeping session_id/transcript_path close to a real session.
